Complaint Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had vocal complaints of pain (e.g., that hurts, ouch, stop) in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
346 J0800C_FACE_EXPRSN_CD J0800C_FACE_EXPRSN_CD J0800C Staff Assessment for Pain: Facial Expression Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had facial expressions (e.g., grimaces, winces, wrinkled forehead, furrowed brow,
